creator: junchoon@dec.sakura.ne.jp
text:
x11/kitty 0.29.0 fails to package on clean-room build with poudriere[-devel].

Commit log states that
> - Don't install all files in $PREFIX/lib/kitty, but in the canonical
>   directories DATADIR, DESKTOPDIR, etc.
But pkg-plist is untouched.
Maybe pkg-plist is missed to commit?

The environment and error parts of build log are as follows.
